title: Pee Safe × Smriti Mandhana — #BeInYourComfortZone
description: Pee Safe teams up with cricketer Smriti Mandhana in this spirited commercial built around the #BeInYourComfortZone campaign. The film celebrates breaking taboos around women's intimate wellness through candid, confidence-led storytelling and bright, energetic framing. A female-first narrative positions Pee Safe as a companion for everyday comfort, strength, and unapologetic self-assurance.

title: Aarohi Loans for Women
description: Aarohi Loans for Women champions financial independence for Indian women through a warm, aspirational brand film. Following the journeys of women turning big dreams into reality, the film uses intimate, real-world vignettes and an uplifting score to frame Aarohi as a trusted partner. It reframes borrowing as empowerment, not burden.

title: Centrum × Kajal Aggarwal — Chief Claims Advocate
description: Centrum enlists actor Kajal Aggarwal as its Chief Claims Advocate in this polished commercial that demystifies daily nutritional gaps. Through clean, credibility-driven direction and a confident on-screen presence, the film communicates Centrum's science-backed multivitamin promise, balancing star appeal with product clarity to earn the trust of health-conscious households.

title: Vertical Campaign Reel
description: A vertical Instagram reel crafted for mobile-first storytelling, pairing tight, energetic framing with a syncopated edit built to stop the scroll. Designed for discovery and shareability, it distils a campaign moment into seconds of punchy, platform-native motion that rewards repeated viewing in the feed.

title: Armani Exchange × Kartik Aaryan — Fall 2024 Watch Collection
description: Armani Exchange taps actor Kartik Aaryan for its Fall 2024 watch collection in a slick, rhythm-driven fashion film. Shot with editorial precision and a metropolitan mood, the spot fuses product hero shots with Kartik's effortless charm. The result is a youthful, premium statement that frames the watches as essential everyday luxury.

title: Collaboration Still
description: A square collaboration still for Instagram, captured from the set and framed for a clean grid. The image carries an easy, behind-the-scenes mood, pairing the studio's craft with a partner brand in a single, editorial composition that feels spontaneous yet considered.

title: PocketFM — Audio Stories Reel
description: PocketFM's audio-storytelling world comes alive in this vertical Instagram reel. Built to convert scrollers into listeners, the cut uses snappy, sound-led editing and expressive motion to dramatise the platform's immersive fiction. It's a punchy, platform-native tease engineered for instant curiosity and tap-through.

title: Square Campaign Post
description: A square Instagram post still from a social campaign, composed for a clean grid presence. The frame favours brand clarity with a confident, editorial mood, extending the campaign's visual language into the feed with restraint and polish that reads instantly at thumbnail scale.

description: A square campaign post built for Instagram's grid, balancing product clarity with a warm, lifestyle-led mood. The still translates a larger campaign idea into a single, self-contained frame designed to read instantly at feed scale without losing its editorial composure.

title: Square Brand Post
description: A square Instagram post still from a campaign, composed for strong grid presence. The frame pairs brand clarity with a calm, editorial mood, extending the production's visual language into the feed with restraint and a confident sense of composition.

title: Collaboration Set Still
description: A square collaboration still from the set, framed for Instagram with a casual, story-led mood. The image documents a partnership moment between the studio and a brand, captured with candid, on-set energy that feels alive rather than staged.

title: Collaboration Grid Still
description: A square collaboration still from a production, composed for Instagram's grid with a relaxed, on-set mood. The frame captures a candid brand moment, balancing polish with the spontaneity of a working shoot and the ease of a shared creative partnership.

description: A square campaign still for Instagram, styled with clean light and confident framing. The image distils the production's tone into one grid-ready frame built to hold attention at feed scale while keeping its editorial calm.

description: A square collaboration post for Instagram, pairing the studio with a partner brand in a single, grid-ready frame. The still balances both identities with a relaxed, editorial mood, capturing a behind-the-moment feel from the set.

title: Vertical Brand Reel
description: A vertical Instagram reel engineered for the feed, using brisk pacing and clean, mobile-first composition to deliver a campaign beat in seconds. The edit is built around retention and shareability, translating a brand moment into scroll-stopping motion that feels native to the platform and invites a second watch.

title: Vertical Social Cut
description: A vertical Instagram reel tuned for discovery, layering rhythmic editing with confident, platform-native framing. Crafted to reward a glance and earn a tap, it compresses a campaign idea into a few seconds of energetic, feed-ready motion designed to travel across shares and saves.

title: Vicks Roll On + Inhaler Ad — ft. Guneet Sandhu
description: Vicks brings fast relief to the feed with a punchy YouTube Shorts ad featuring Guneet Sandhu. In under a minute, the vertical cut demonstrates the Roll On and Inhaler's on-the-go comfort with snappy edits and relatable, congestion-era humour. The film is built for thumb-stopping recall and instant, mobile-first brand association.

title: Square Brand Still
description: A square campaign still composed for the feed, favouring brand clarity and an editorial calm. The frame extends the shoot's visual language into a single, self-contained social image that reads cleanly at thumbnail scale.

title: Disney+ Hotstar — The Night Manager Pranks (Aditya Roy Kapur)
description: Disney+ Hotstar launched The Night Manager with a mischievous guerrilla promo starring Aditya Roy Kapur surprising unsuspecting hotel guests. Blending scripted comedy with hidden-camera spontaneity, the film amplifies the series' intrigue while showcasing Aditya's charisma. It's a playful, shareable tease engineered to drive streaming sign-ups and social buzz.

title: Square Campaign Shoot
description: A square Instagram still from a campaign shoot, framed for strong grid impact. The composition leans on clean light and confident styling to carry the brand story in a single, scroll-resistant image that rewards a closer look.

title: Square Social Still
description: A square social post still composed for Instagram, distilling a campaign's tone into one polished frame. Restrained and brand-forward, it extends the visual narrative into the feed without competing for attention, letting the product and mood speak.

title: Skinn Noura — A Gift From You, To You
description: Skinn's Noura fragrance is celebrated as a gift from you, to you in this sensorial brand film. Soft, feminine cinematography and a delicate rhythm frame Noura as an act of self-love rather than occasion-wear luxury. The film leans into intimacy and ritual, positioning the scent as a daily, personal indulgence.

title: Dell Futurist — Make Music With Lost Stories On Alienware
description: Dell's Futurist initiative teams Alienware with electronic duo Lost Stories to turn cutting-edge tech into music. This brand film follows the artists composing on high-performance machines, merging product capability with creative ambition. Energetic, tech-glossy visuals position Alienware as the instrument for makers pushing what's possible next.

title: World Is Yours To Take — Sustainability Streetwear India
description: 'World Is Yours To Take' is a brand film championing sustainability in Indian streetwear. Following young creators reimagining fashion through conscious choices, it pairs documentary warmth with bold, street-styled visuals. The film frames responsible design as cultural ownership, encouraging a generation to wear its values and claim the future on its own terms.
